_sizing_notes.power_range: The base-to-peak power ratio affects thermal dynamics. Larger swings = more challenging control. Typical GPU: 20-100% of TDP.
_sizing_notes.period_vs_tau: For visible thermal oscillations, workload period should be comparable to thermal time constant. If period >> τ, system reaches quasi-steady-state. If period << τ, temperature barely changes.
_sizing_notes.control_authority: Ensure cooling system can handle peak power. At peak power with max cooling, T_die should stay below T_max.

sinusoidal._description: Smooth sinusoidal workload for training/inference cycles

step._description: Alternating idle/load steps for batch processing

burst._description: Short high-power bursts for inference serving

stochastic._description: Ornstein-Uhlenbeck random walk for mixed workloads
